data.title: Banks risk losing ecommerce merchants as digital payment rivals pull ahead
data.description: The report found 60% of payment specialists have deployed generative AI, compared with 41% of banks.

data.title: Ryder: Shoppers put savings ahead of speed
data.description: More than half (54%) of consumers now prefer to return online purchases in stores, a pattern Ryder says is firmly established.

data.title: eBay to acquire the secondhand fashion marketplace Tise
data.description: The companies did not disclose terms of the deal, but the acquisition would give eBay access to millions of Tise users in Europe.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Kroger is using AI
data.description: Kroger's use cases for AI range from fulfillment to its online marketplace, data science and more.

data.title: FTC secures $2.5 billion settlement with Amazon over Prime practices
data.description: The order requires Amazon to pay a $1 billion civil penalty — the largest ever tied to a violation of an FTC rule — along with $1.5 billion in refunds to an estimated 35 million customers.
